query: What is the standard return window for products?
expected_answer: The standard return window is 30 calendar days from the delivery date.

query: Are shipping costs refundable when I return a product?
expected_answer: Shipping costs are non-refundable unless the return is due to a defect or error on Acmera's part.

query: How long does it take to process a refund?
expected_answer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after the returned item is received and inspected. For Premium members, it's 2 business days.

query: What is the holiday season extended return window?
expected_answer: Items purchased between November 15 and December 31 have an extended return window until January 31 of the following year.

query: What items cannot be returned?
expected_answer: Opened software, digital downloads, gift cards, perishable goods, and personalized items cannot be returned.

query: What are the different shipping options available?
expected_answer: Acmera offers Standard (5-7 days), Express (2-3 days), and Same-Day delivery in select metro cities.

query: How much does express shipping cost?
expected_answer: Express shipping costs ₹199 on all orders. It's free for Premium Gold members.

query: What cities have same-day delivery?
expected_answer: Same-day delivery is available in Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Chennai, and Pune.

query: What should I do if my package arrives damaged?
expected_answer: Report the damage within 48 hours of delivery with photographic evidence. Acmera will arrange a replacement or full refund at no additional cost.

query: Does Acmera ship internationally?
expected_answer: No, Acmera currently does not offer international shipping. Customers can use third-party forwarding services at their own cost and risk.

query: What payment methods does Acmera accept?
expected_answer: Acmera accepts credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, RuPay), UPI, net banking, Acmera Wallet, EMI, and Cash on Delivery.

query: Is there a cash on delivery option?
expected_answer: Yes, COD is available for orders between ₹200 and ₹25,000 with a ₹49 convenience fee. It's not available for same-day delivery or remote pin codes.

query: What is the maximum Acmera Wallet balance?
expected_answer: The maximum wallet balance is ₹50,000. Minimum load amount is ₹100.

query: What warranty comes with Acmera electronics?
expected_answer: All electronics come with a minimum 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship under normal use.

query: What are the extended warranty options?
expected_answer: Acmera Shield (2-year extension, 8% of product price) and Acmera Shield Plus (3-year extension with accidental damage, 12% of product price).

query: How do I track my order?
expected_answer: Track through the Acmera app or website under 'My Orders'. You'll also receive SMS and email updates at each stage.

query: How much does the Acmera ProBook X15 cost?
expected_answer: The Acmera ProBook X15 costs ₹78,999.

query: What is the battery life of the Acmera Pixel S24?
expected_answer: The Acmera Pixel S24 has a 4500mAh battery.

query: How do I create an Acmera account?
expected_answer: You can create an account using email, phone number, or Google/Apple sign-in. Account creation is free.

query: Can I delete my Acmera account?
expected_answer: Yes, through Account Settings or by contacting support. Account deletion is permanent — all order history, wallet balance, and Premium status are lost.

query: What is the spending threshold for Premium Silver?
expected_answer: Premium Silver is granted after spending ₹25,000 in a calendar year or maintaining an active account for 2+ years.

query: What spending is needed for Premium Gold?
expected_answer: Premium Gold requires spending ₹75,000 in a calendar year or maintaining Premium Silver for 3+ consecutive years.

query: Do Premium members get free shipping?
expected_answer: Premium Silver members get free standard shipping on orders over ₹500. Premium Gold members get free express shipping on all orders regardless of value.

query: What is the Acmera referral program?
expected_answer: Refer a friend and earn ₹500 wallet credit when they make their first purchase of ₹1,000+. The referred customer gets ₹300 off their first order.

query: What smart home devices does Acmera sell?
expected_answer: Acmera sells the SmartHome Hub Pro (₹8,999), SmartHome Camera 360 (₹3,999), and integrates with Google Home, Alexa, and partially with Apple HomeKit.

query: Is the SmartHome Hub Pro compatible with Apple HomeKit?
expected_answer: The SmartHome Hub Pro is not currently HomeKit compatible, but compatibility is planned for Q2 2026. The SmartHome Camera 360 is HomeKit compatible.

query: What is Acmera's trade-in program?
expected_answer: Customers can trade in old devices for wallet credit: laptops up to ₹25,000, smartphones up to ₹10,000, smart home devices up to ₹2,000.

query: What are the cloud storage plans for the SmartHome Camera?
expected_answer: Free (live view only), Basic (₹99/month, 7-day history), Premium (₹199/month, 30-day history with person detection). 3-camera bundle available at ₹449/month.

query: What is the minimum order for corporate bulk pricing?
expected_answer: Orders of 10+ units qualify for bulk pricing: 10-49 units get 10% off, 50-99 get 15% off, 100+ get 20% off plus free express shipping.

query: Can I change my delivery address after ordering?
expected_answer: Address changes are only possible if the order hasn't been shipped yet. Contact support immediately with your order number. Once shipped, the address cannot be changed.

query: Does my wallet balance expire?
expected_answer: Regular wallet balance doesn't expire as long as your account is active. After 18 months of inactivity, the balance is forfeited. Promotional wallet credits expire after 90 days.

query: What is the dead pixel policy for laptops?
expected_answer: Acmera allows warranty claims for 5 or more dead pixels, or 1 or more dead pixels in the center third of the display.

query: How do I request a data export of my account?
expected_answer: Request a data export through Account Settings or by contacting support. Export requests are fulfilled within 30 days.

query: What types of promotional events does Acmera run?
expected_answer: Acmera runs seasonal sales (Diwali, Republic Day, Independence Day, Year-End), flash sales (6-24 hours), clearance events (quarterly), and Premium-exclusive sales.

query: What is the return window for items bought during a promotional sale?
expected_answer: Promotional items have a reduced 15-day return window and a 10% restocking fee. Items marked 'Final Sale' cannot be returned at all.

query: What EMI options are available?
expected_answer: No-cost EMI on select products for orders above ₹5,000. Available on HDFC, ICICI, SBI, Axis, and Kotak credit cards. Tenure: 3, 6, 9, or 12 months.

query: What is the warranty claim process?
expected_answer: Contact support → remote diagnosis → prepaid shipping label → repair or replacement in 7-14 business days after receiving the item.

query: Do Premium members get early access to sales?
expected_answer: Yes, Premium members get 48-hour early access to seasonal sales and new product launches. Flash sales are accessible 24 hours early. Premium Gold also gets quarterly 15% discount codes.

query: What happens to my Premium status if I don't meet the spending threshold?
expected_answer: You'll be notified 30 days before downgrade, with a 90-day grace period where you keep current tier benefits. Additional spending during this time counts toward reinstating your tier.

query: Can corporate orders be customized with a company logo?
expected_answer: Yes, for orders of 50+ units. Options include laser engraving on electronics, custom packaging, and personalized greeting cards. Adds 7-10 business days. Customized items are not returnable.
